verses.text: Woe to the city that 'obeyed not the voice... received not correction,' and trusted not in the LORD. Hardened. To refuse every call and rebuke is a fearful state.
Woe to the city that 'obeyed not the voice... received not correction,' and trusted not in the LORD. Hardened. To refuse every call and rebuke is a fearful state.
Her princes are 'roaring lions,' her judges 'evening wolves,' her prophets light, her priests have profaned the sanctuary. Leaders corrupt. When every office is defiled, the city is doomed.
Her princes are 'roaring lions,' her judges 'evening wolves,' her prophets light, her priests have profaned the sanctuary. Leaders corrupt. When every office is defiled, the city is doomed.
Yet 'the just LORD is in the midst thereof,' bringing judgment to light each morning; but the unjust 'knoweth no shame.' Shameless sin. God's daily justice goes unheeded by the brazen.
Yet 'the just LORD is in the midst thereof,' bringing judgment to light each morning; but the unjust 'knoweth no shame.' Shameless sin. God's daily justice goes unheeded by the brazen.
Yet 'the just LORD is in the midst thereof,' bringing judgment to light each morning; but the unjust 'knoweth no shame.' Shameless sin. God's daily justice goes unheeded by the brazen.

Wait on Me, for I will gather the nations to judgment; then I will 'turn to the people a pure language,' to serve Me 'with one consent.' Cleansing promised. God will purify lips and unite hearts to worship Him.

Wait on Me, for I will gather the nations to judgment; then I will 'turn to the people a pure language,' to serve Me 'with one consent.' Cleansing promised. God will purify lips and unite hearts to worship Him.
From afar His suppliants shall bring an offering; He will leave 'an afflicted and poor people' that trust in His name. A humble remnant. God preserves the lowly who lean wholly on Him.
From afar His suppliants shall bring an offering; He will leave 'an afflicted and poor people' that trust in His name. A humble remnant. God preserves the lowly who lean wholly on Him.
From afar His suppliants shall bring an offering; He will leave 'an afflicted and poor people' that trust in His name. A humble remnant. God preserves the lowly who lean wholly on Him.
From afar His suppliants shall bring an offering; He will leave 'an afflicted and poor people' that trust in His name. A humble remnant. God preserves the lowly who lean wholly on Him.
'Sing, O daughter of Zion'; the LORD has taken away thy judgments; the King is in thy midst; 'thou shalt not see evil any more.' Joy restored. Pardon turns mourning into singing.
'Sing, O daughter of Zion'; the LORD has taken away thy judgments; the King is in thy midst; 'thou shalt not see evil any more.' Joy restored. Pardon turns mourning into singing.
Fear not; 'the LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty... he will rejoice over thee with joy; he will rest in his love.' Astonishing love. God Himself sings over His redeemed people.
Fear not; 'the LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty... he will rejoice over thee with joy; he will rest in his love.' Astonishing love. God Himself sings over His redeemed people.
He will gather the sorrowful, undo their afflictions, and make them 'a name and a praise among all people.' Honour restored. The shamed shall yet be praised by God's own doing.
